description: Romanian telemedicine startup providing video consultation platform connecting patients with doctors. One of the first licensed telemedicine providers in Romania following regulatory changes.
business_model: B2C - Direct to patients; B2B for corporate health programs
target_market: Romanian consumers and employers seeking convenient healthcare access
competitive_advantage: Early mover in Romanian telemedicine, regulatory expertise, local market knowledge

varden_fit.rationale: Entry point into Romanian market - early-stage, affordable acquisition target
